temporal_description:
(00:00-00:01) A young girl with blonde hair, her face smeared with dirt and streaked with tears, desperately shakes a man's arm. She pleads with him, trying to wake him. (Storyline: The scene opens on a moment of intense distress, establishing a child in a state of panic and desperation, trying to rouse an adult.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: Panicked, pleading, and desperate. 2) Background sounds or music: None.)
(00:02-00:05) The camera cuts to a close-up of an older man's face. He is sweating and has a deeply worried and somber expression. A hand, presumably the girl's, rests on his shoulder, trying to comfort him. (Storyline: This shot reveals the man's emotional state, showing that he is also deeply troubled and distressed by the situation, sharing the girl's anxiety.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: Urgent and insistent. 2) Background sounds or music: None.)
